title: Allowable Area Factor (Table 506.2)
text:
TABLE 506.2 — Allowable area factor (At, square feet per story) by occupancy group and construction type. Tabular base values; frontage and sprinkler increases per Section 506.3 INCREASE these values and are not reflected here.
Group A-1 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 15,500; Type II-B: 8,500; Type III-A: 14,000; Type III-B: 8,500; Type IV: 15,000; Type V-A: 11,500; Type V-B: 5,500.
Group A-2 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 15,500; Type II-B: 9,500; Type III-A: 14,000; Type III-B: 9,500; Type IV: 15,000; Type V-A: 11,500; Type V-B: 6,000.
Group A-3 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 15,500; Type II-B: 9,500; Type III-A: 14,000; Type III-B: 9,500; Type IV: 15,000; Type V-A: 11,500; Type V-B: 6,000.
Group B (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 37,500; Type II-B: 23,000; Type III-A: 28,500; Type III-B: 19,000; Type IV: 36,000; Type V-A: 18,000; Type V-B: 9,000.
Group E (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 26,500; Type II-B: 14,500; Type III-A: 23,500; Type III-B: 14,500; Type IV: 25,500; Type V-A: 18,500; Type V-B: 9,500.
Group F-1 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 25,000; Type II-B: 15,500; Type III-A: 19,000; Type III-B: 12,000; Type IV: 33,500; Type V-A: 14,000; Type V-B: 8,500.
Group I-2 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 55,000; Type II-A: 26,500; Type II-B: Not Permitted; Type III-A: 26,500; Type III-B: Not Permitted; Type IV: 26,500; Type V-A: 18,500; Type V-B: Not Permitted.
Group M (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 21,500; Type II-B: 12,500; Type III-A: 18,500; Type III-B: 12,500; Type IV: 20,500; Type V-A: 14,000; Type V-B: 9,000.
Group R-1 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 24,000; Type II-B: 16,000; Type III-A: 24,000; Type III-B: 16,000; Type IV: 20,500; Type V-A: 12,000; Type V-B: 7,000.
Group R-2 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: Unlimited; Type II-A: 24,000; Type II-B: 16,000; Type III-A: 24,000; Type III-B: 16,000; Type IV: 20,500; Type V-A: 12,000; Type V-B: 7,000.
Group S-1 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 48,000; Type II-A: 26,000; Type II-B: 17,500; Type III-A: 26,000; Type III-B: 17,500; Type IV: 25,500; Type V-A: 14,000; Type V-B: 9,000.
Group S-2 (allowable area, sf/story) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 79,000; Type II-A: 39,000; Type II-B: 26,000; Type III-A: 39,000; Type III-B: 26,000; Type IV: 38,500; Type V-A: 21,000; Type V-B: 13,500. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]

title: Allowable Number of Stories (Table 504.4)
text:
TABLE 504.4 — Allowable number of stories above grade plane by occupancy group and construction type. Non-sprinklered buildings are limited to one story fewer than the tabular value (footnote, simplified).
Group A-1 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 5; Type II-A: 3; Type II-B: 2; Type III-A: 3; Type III-B: 2; Type IV: 3; Type V-A: 2; Type V-B: 1.
Group A-2 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 3; Type II-B: 2; Type III-A: 3; Type III-B: 2; Type IV: 3; Type V-A: 2; Type V-B: 1.

Group I-2 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 5; Type II-A: 2; Type II-B: Not Permitted; Type III-A: 1; Type III-B: Not Permitted; Type IV: 1; Type V-A: 1; Type V-B: Not Permitted.
Group M (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 4; Type II-B: 2; Type III-A: 4; Type III-B: 2; Type IV: 4; Type V-A: 3; Type V-B: 1.
Group R-1 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 4; Type II-B: 4; Type III-A: 4; Type III-B: 4; Type IV: 4; Type V-A: 3; Type V-B: 2.
Group R-2 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 4; Type II-B: 4; Type III-A: 4; Type III-B: 4; Type IV: 4; Type V-A: 3; Type V-B: 2.
Group S-1 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 4; Type II-B: 2; Type III-A: 3; Type III-B: 2; Type IV: 4; Type V-A: 3; Type V-B: 1.
Group S-2 (stories above grade plane) — Type I-A: Unlimited; Type I-B: 11; Type II-A: 5; Type II-B: 3; Type III-A: 4; Type III-B: 3; Type IV: 4; Type V-A: 4; Type V-B: 2. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]

title: Minimum Number of Exits per Story
text:
Section 1006.3.2 — Minimum number of exits or access to exits per story, by occupant load.
Occupant load 1–500: minimum 2 exits.
Occupant load 501–1,000: minimum 3 exits.
Occupant load greater than 1,000: minimum 4 exits. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]

title: Required Capacity Based on Occupant Load
text: Section 1005.3 — Required egress capacity. Stairways: 0.3 inch of width per occupant served (1005.3.1). Other egress components including doors: 0.2 inch of width per occupant served (1005.3.2). These are the capacity factors the deterministic exit-capacity check computes with. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]

title: High-Rise Buildings (Applicability Threshold)
text: Section 403 — High-rise buildings. Applicability threshold: an occupied floor located more than 75 feet above the lowest level of fire department vehicle access. Buildings exceeding the threshold trigger the Section 403 high-rise provisions (smoke control, emergency voice/alarm communication, standby power) which the reviewer must confirm are shown on the plans. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]

title: Minimum Number of Required Plumbing Fixtures (Table 403.1)
text:
TABLE 403.1 — Minimum plumbing fixtures, abbreviated occupant-per-fixture ratios used by the deterministic fixture check.
Occupancy A: 1 water closet per 75 occupants; 1 lavatory per 200 occupants.
Occupancy B: 1 water closet per 25 occupants; 1 lavatory per 40 occupants.
Occupancy E: 1 water closet per 50 occupants; 1 lavatory per 50 occupants.
Occupancy F: 1 water closet per 100 occupants; 1 lavatory per 100 occupants.
Occupancy I: 1 water closet per 25 occupants; 1 lavatory per 25 occupants.
Occupancy M: 1 water closet per 500 occupants; 1 lavatory per 750 occupants.
Occupancy R-1: 1 water closet per 10 occupants; 1 lavatory per 10 occupants.
Occupancy R-2: 1 water closet per 10 occupants; 1 lavatory per 10 occupants.
Occupancy S: 1 water closet per 100 occupants; 1 lavatory per 100 occupants. [Abbreviated values transcribed in app/code_library/deterministic/tables.py; identical to the deterministic engine's lookup data. Confirm against the adopted edition for a licensed deployment.]
